Official documentation for Claude Code TypeScript SDK. Build powerful AI applications with Anthropic's latest models including Claude 3.5 Sonnet and Claude 3 Opus.

anthropics/anthropic-sdk-typescript - GitHub

The official TypeScript SDK for the Anthropic API. Supports streaming, tool use, and all latest Claude models including claude-sonnet-4-6 and claude-opus-4.
github.com 2026-02-20

@anthropic-ai/sdk - npm

Install the official Anthropic TypeScript SDK via npm: npm install @anthropic-ai/sdk. Supports Node.js and modern runtimes.
npmjs.com 2026-03-01

Claude Code - Agentic Coding Tool from Anthropic

Claude Code is Anthropic's official CLI for Claude. An agentic coding tool that understands your codebase and can write code, fix bugs, and create tests.
